ddls:
CREATE TABLE "family_compositions" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family composition */,
  "family_type" TEXT /* Type of family composition (e.g., B, G, BB, BG, GB) */,
  "number_of_families" INTEGER /* Number of families in this composition */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Total number of children in this composition */,
  "gender_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of males to females (e.g., 97 boys to 100 girls) */,
  "p_b_value" REAL /* Value of p_B (probability of a boy being born) */,
  "family_structure" TEXT /* Description of the family structure (e.g., single parent, two-parent household) */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the family members */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income range of the family */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest education level of the family members */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the family (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the family composition record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the family composition record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family composition */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the demographic data was collected */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population for this family composition in the given year */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the demographic data */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population (e.g., number of people in different age groups) */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the population (e.g., number of males and females) */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution of the population */,
  "marital_status_distribution" TEXT /* Marital status distribution of the population (e.g., single, married, divorced) */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average number of people in the household */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the demographic entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the demographic entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_demographics_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES family_compositions ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family composition */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the family member */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the family member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the family member */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the primary family member (e.g., parent, child, sibling) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the family member record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the family member record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES family_compositions ("family_id")
)
